title: Bounded Capability Extraction Clause v0.2.1
description:
Bounded Capability Extraction Clause v0.2.1 defines egress metering, extraction source-classes, anti-distillation discipline, composition caps, witness packet requirements, and re-admission handoff for c-class capability extraction from external oracles.

The package contains the canonical Markdown source, an academic PDF rendering, and a witness-compatible b-layer review record. The b-layer review verdict is PASS, while sealing and integration remain separate steps.
notes: Final textual clause and academic rendering. b-layer PASS reviewed draft. Not sealed integration, not legal advice, not product certification, and not deployment approval.
